name: EmbedMyReviews
description:
What EmbedMyReviews Does

It’s a fairly new platform in the space that offers agency-specific white label reputation management services. It focuses on simplifying review management for clients under your brand. 

Source: G2

Key Features

  • Aggregates reviews from major review sites, clients have option to manage and respond to reviews in one place
  • Customizable branding options (like logos, favicons, and themes) and se of your own branded domain
  • Integration of third-party scripts. 
  • They support Stripe for payments, allow the creation of custom subscription plans, and offer free trials.
  • Allows for the use of your own Email/SMS service for review campaigns

Pricing

Starts at $99 per month for resellers and agencies

Pros

✅The team pays special emphasis on good UI and UX

✅It’s a smaller team so support is more proactive and personal

✅Very agency-focused and offers additional support like payments for small businesses

Cons

❌The platform is expensive for the limited features the offer, reselling can be harder to clients in this industry who are used to feature-heavy products and integration with other tools

❌Review sites are limited and fewer additional features for review management

❌Scaling to new capabilities and clientele can be difficult
what_people_say:
“I like the ease of use and navigation in the dashboard and widgets management.”

   - Review collected by and hosted on Capterra

‍

“There are more feature enhancements on its way.”

   - Review collected by and hosted on Capterra
